title: Support ##[M:N] range cycle delay in SVA sequences

features.name: SVA sequence range cycle delay ##[M:N]
features.description: Code should include an SVA sequence using the ##[M:N] range cycle delay syntax where M and N are constant positive integers and M is less than or equal to N

features.name: multi-step SVA sequence with range and regular delays
features.description: Code should include a multi-step SVA sequence that chains a range delay ##[M:N] with a regular single-cycle delay ##1 followed by another sequence term

features.name: SVA sequence with clocking event and range delay
features.description: Code should include an assert property with a clocking event and a range cycle delay in the sequence
